rationale: Educ. Code §29.0051 governs a model IEP form for special education. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.0051. MODEL FORM. (a) The agency shall develop a model form for use in developing an individualized education program under Section 29.005(b).
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
